title: glaucium luteum
intro: Glaucium luteum, also known as hornpoppy or yellow hornpoppy, is a flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. The plant's roots, seeds, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Glaucium luteum include relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Glaucium luteum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
